reasoning: The root cause was identified as severe packet loss on the F1-c interface (Downlink), which disrupted control signaling between the O-CU and O-DU. This is prioritized over throughput and latency fluctuations due to the 'hard error' nature of packet loss. The failure cascaded from the control plane (F1-c) to the user plane (F1-u) and reporting plane (E2).
